Configuration settings, main event loop initialization, and memory pool definitions for JerryScript on Curie and Quark BSPs, and partition scheme variables for QUARK code location and page allocation.

## Folders
- **[arc](arc/README.md)**: Configuration settings, main event loop initialization, and memory pool definitions for JerryScript on Curie BSP.
- **[include](include/README.md)**: Defines partition scheme variables for QUARK code location and page allocation.
- **[quark](quark/README.md)**: Configuration settings, main entry point, and memory pool definitions for JerryScript on Quark BSP.
